scoringPlays.text: Dylan Wade 4 Yd pass from Tayven Jackson (Noe Ruelas Kick)
Ta. Jackson pass to A. Addae for 20 yds, for a TD (N. Ruelas KICK)
LJ Martin 1 Yd Run (Will Ferrin Kick)
LJ Martin 1 Yd Run (Will Ferrin Kick)
LJ Martin 4 Yd Run (Will Ferrin Kick)
Parker Kingston 55 Yd Punt Return (Will Ferrin Kick)
Tayven Jackson 4 Yd pass from Agyeman Addae (Noe Ruelas Kick)
Parker Kingston 46 Yd pass from Bear Bachmeier (Will Ferrin Kick)

videos.headline: Dylan Wade hauls in UCF’s first score vs. BYU
videos.description: Tayven Jackson sends a perfect strike to Dylan Wade as UCF strikes first against BYU

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dylan Wade hauls in UCF’s first score vs. BYU) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Agyeman Addae takes it 20 yards to the house for UCF
videos.description: Agyeman Addae hauls in a wide-open pass from Tayven Jackson and sprints 20 yards for a touchdown to pad UCF's lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Agyeman Addae takes it 20 yards to the house for UCF) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: LJ Martin powers in for BYU's first TD vs. UCF
videos.description: LJ Martin punches it into the end zone to put BYU on the board against UCF.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LJ Martin powers in for BYU’s first TD vs. UCF) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: LJ Martin rushes in to level BYU vs. UCF
videos.description: LJ Martin sparks comeback with another muscle into the end zone for BYU.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LJ Martin rushes in to level BYU vs. UCF) 2025/11/29 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Will Ferrin makes 26-yard field goal) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: LJ Martin finds way into the end zone for his third TD
videos.description: LJ Martin muscles his way through the UCF's defense for his third touchdown of the game. has context menu

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LJ Martin finds way into the end zone for his third TD) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Agyeman Addae throws 4-yard touchdown pass to Tayven Jackson
videos.description: Agyeman Addae connects for 4-yard TD pass

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Agyeman Addae throws 4-yard touchdown pass to Tayven Jackson) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Bear Bachmeier finds Parker Kingston for 46-yard BYU TD
videos.description: BYU's Bear Bachmeier connects with Parker Kingston for a 46-yard touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Bear Bachmeier finds Parker Kingston for 46-yard BYU TD) 2025/11/29 ESHEET

videos.headline: Parker Kingston delivers house call on punt return for BYU
videos.description: Parker Kingston bobs and weaves through UCF to take the punt return to the house to extend BYU’s lead to 30-14.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Parker Kingston delivers house call on punt return for BYU) 2025/11/29 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (Will Ferrin kicks 50-yard field goal) 2025/11/29 ESHEET
